prompt: Create a vertical hyper-realistic macro diorama photograph of miniature construction workers sculpting a gigantic crispy McDonald's fried chicken drumstick as if it were a construction site. The oversized golden-brown fried chicken piece sits diagonally on top of a large red-and-white branded fast-food box, with the visible front text reading “McDonald's” and “i'm lovin' it,” plus a large yellow arches logo on the red side panel and a blurred matching sign in the warm background. Show exactly 18 tiny construction workers wearing yellow hard hats, reflective vests, work pants, and boots: 2 on a metal scaffold at left, 1 standing on top of the chicken with a tool, 1 on a suspended crane platform above the right side, 1 at the drumstick end with a long tool, 1 hammering near the front center, 1 standing beside the ladder on the right side of the chicken, 1 working against the red side panel, 2 at the base of the left ladder, 1 holding plans near the front center, 1 by the central ladder on the box, 1 red-helmet worker near the right foreground, 4 workers gathered in a small discussion group at the lower left foreground, and 1 partially visible worker at the very bottom edge. Include exactly 4 ladders, 1 left scaffold, 1 hanging crane basket with chains, 1 yellow front-loader vehicle in the lower right, 2 wheelbarrows, scattered fried crumb rubble, tiny shovels, hammers, boards, and worksite debris. Use shallow depth of field, dramatic warm studio lighting, rich orange tones, crisp crunchy texture on the chicken breading, realistic scale contrast, playful surreal advertising aesthetic, high-detail product photography, no extra text, no watermark.
